description: Synthesia is basically your AI-powered video buddy. You get a polished video with a realistic AI avatar talking your words. Pretty good in a lot of areas, needs work in others.
author: Jade M.
pros: Tons of avatars to choose from, so your videos actually feel human. No awkward robot vibes. Supports a lot of languages and fast translation/dubbing.
cons: Sometimes the AI avatars can feel a little stiff, especially if you want super expressive gestures. Also pricier for big teams.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Scalable avatar video creation for marketing & education
description: I’m Matías, founder of Anunzi (digital marketing & AI). We’ve used Synthesia to produce avatar videos for our brand and for educational clients, mainly short explainers and landing-page assets. From a security perspective, the platform has felt professional and transparent about data handling, and we’ve had no issues in daily agency use. In terms of value for money, it shines when replacing traditional production or when you need to publish many short videos quickly; the ROI is less clear if you require multiple seats or heavy post-production. Customer support has been courteous and effective, usually pointing us to workable solutions on first contact. Voice generation is good for clear, neutral delivery and keeps improving, but expressive tone is the next step I’d like to see. Feature-wise, it’s optimized for speed, brand consistency, and non-technical creators rather than deep post, which is fine for our core use cases; for advanced edits, we export and finish elsewhere. On audience engagement, our avatar explainers have outperformed static content on watch-through and comprehension for both marketing pages and internal training. Overall, I’d rate Synthesia 4 stars: a reliable, scalable tool for producing on-brand avatar videos, with room to grow in voice expressiveness and advanced editing.
author: Matias C.
pros: I like how quickly I can turn a script into a professional-looking avatar video without coordinating studios, actors, or voiceover talent. The voice library and languages are broad, lip-sync is solid, and pronunciation controls help with brand names and acronyms. Templates, brand assets, and subtitles keep our output on-brand and consistent, which has been ideal for producing multiple short explainers for Anunzi and for our education clients. The workflow is predictable, the documentation is clear, and support has been responsive when we’ve needed guidance.
cons: The voices can still sound a bit robotic on longer narrations or when I need nuanced emotion. The built-in editor is intentionally simple, which means limited timeline control, transitions, and audio mixing; for anything beyond straightforward cuts and captions, I often finish in another NLE. Pricing is fair for a small team, but adding seats and workspaces can escalate costs. I’ve also seen occasional render queues at peak times, so planning ahead helps.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the worst platforms I’ve used, save your money.
description: I’ve given Synthesia.io multiple chances, and the experience has been nothing but frustrating. Their content moderation is inconsistent, subjective, and completely lacking in transparency. I had videos approved, only to have nearly identical versions later flagged without explanation. When I reached out, I received vague responses that provided no real clarity on what was wrong. The technology itself is extremely limited. Small edits... like swapping an avatar for a picture or correcting pronunciation... cause unnecessary issues and delays. For a platform that markets itself as cutting-edge AI video generation, it feels outdated and unreliable. What’s worse is the customer support. Instead of offering real solutions, they hide behind policy links and warnings. It feels more like dealing with an automated system than a team that values paying customers. At this point, I’ve wasted far too much time and energy. If you’re considering this service, don’t. There are better, more transparent, and more reliable platforms out there. Synthesia.io is simply not worth it.
author: Jide G.
pros: Their stock avatars are high quality and visually impressive, but the policies around how they can be used are unnecessarily restrictive and highly subjective. Instead of empowering creators, the rules feel arbitrary, making it difficult to confidently use the very tools that are supposed to be the platform’s main strength. What should be a feature that adds value ends up creating hesitation and frustration, since approval seems more dependent on interpretation than on clear, consistent standards.
cons: Synthesia.io enforces policies that feel entirely subjective and inconsistent. Videos that are approved one day can be flagged the next, even when only minor, harmless edits are made, such as changing an image or fixing word pronunciation. Instead of clear, transparent guidelines, users are left guessing what might trigger moderation, which creates unnecessary frustration and wasted time. The lack of explanation or consistency makes their so-called “standards” feel arbitrary, leaving creators vulnerable to random enforcement rather than a fair, predictable system.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Simply amazing. I work with AI tools, but this platform has provided productivity and innovation gains that far, far exceeded my expectations
author: Justin W.
pros: Simple, clean UI with amazing AI support to generate scripts and some very realistic AI avatars. The reduction in overhead and time-to-deliver has been game-changing for us, enabling our organisation to support our clients with engaging content at 10% of the cost, delivered in hours, not weeks. The video screen capture browser extension save further time and means the content can be created end-to-end in the one platform.
cons: The video editing tools are still in development. They are functional, but currently missing a few features that would further reduce efforts. The voice actors for my region (Australia) are limited, but they seem to be adding new options regularly.
author_profession: Senior Consultant - Advisory and Change Management
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Overall Synthesia has helped to cut production time and create media pieces. The training and ongoing support is fantastic.
author: Vickey H.
pros: Synthesia is easy to use. They are constantly building their avatar database and templates. The company has great customer and technical support
cons: I cannot select which slides I need to publish. Sometimes I need to pull a couple of slides not every slide in the project. Not a big deal, but would be a great feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A key tool for anyone creating recorded content
description: Synthesia is a great way to create videos without the hassle of finding and recording presenters. Very easy to update and localize.
author: David K.
pros: Super-quick way to create high-quality person-to-camera videos in any language. Very easy to use with lots of layout options.
cons: Hopefully will gain some additional features like camera control to make the videos even more visually interesting.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Synthesia is great innovation that helps large businesses!
description: great experience, their team is very positive and proactive. I like that we can pump out a lot of training videos quickly if needed.
author: Pierre R.
pros: New innovation they keep coming out with and ease of use. I enjoy the avatars they have and love that they continue to add more.
cons: The editing software could be better and the quality of their video player. Many times when played from their video player the sound and video do not sync.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Sales representatives very good, helpful and patient. Log on details went effortlessly. Resources to links to webinar also available good reminders
author: Clint M.
pros: The ease of putting the slide packs together. The ability to truly make it your own content. Avatar creation with languages very impressive
cons: To be honest it’s hard not to like it but the cost per account played a big part from my head office allowing how many accounts that I could purchase, if it was cheaper I could of used maybe 5 accounts in Canada alone. Not including my Global branches
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Synthesia saves me a lot of time when creating visual presentations and narrating and publishing them.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: My favorite feature of Synthesia is the Avatars. I love their body movement, intonation, and how dynamic and realistic they can be.
cons: The price is a little too high, and I don't like the few publishing minutes you get for that price.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Synthesia Arbitrary and restrictive Community Guidelines
description: Indifferent and not interested in helping the customer/developer in new innovations.
author: Reid R.
pros: I do not have a positive experience to submit to this platform.
cons: Synthesia 1. “Community Guidelines” are far too abstract and arbitrary leaving too much interpretation to your censors of free speech to be predictable from the customer/developer. For example, the cancellation of customer/developer videos for “impersonation” seems to not allow for any names either for the avatar to call themselves by name, nor for the avatar to address any person by name is contrary to normal conservational language standards. For any customer/developer, the inability to use common language in your product does not allow for creative efforts into virtual environments to include live, virtual and constructive environments. This restrictive policy removes the ability to present a normal dialogue in virtual environments and is too restrictive, and NOT mentioned in the material you provide prior to purchase of your product. 2. The application of your “Community Guidelines” is punitive and not collaborative. Your “artificial intelligence” has been programmed to detect the potential of “impersonation” should flag the material in question AS the material is being produced in the development window of your product. You could easily program your system to advise the customer/developer of the potential issue during the input stage that would save many hours of time from the customer/developer. Your cancellation of customer/developer videos is very comparable to COVID level censorship and authoritarian means of silencing voices. 3. The inability to then edit and correct the flagged “violation of community standards” by being locked OUT of the materials that we were used during the development cycle means even a larger loss of time. 4. The lack of customer service and coordination over these issues is alarming and seems dictatorial. I see no effort to engage the customer/developer over these concerns, nor correct the waste of time that your company presents. For the reasons above, I recommend avoiding this company. There are far more providers with better products and services. Reid Reasor
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our experience has gone from good to better to best. We've used Synthesia to drive customer, staff and training videos. Enabling a commercial opportunity to increase revenue. The overall enhancements and roadmap of the product shows that the user(s) are at the forefront of Synthesias mind and making a truly single platform for media creation is clear. We renewed for a further 2 years and took out additional licences to support our growth and opportunities from our initial ''test'' of the tool
author: Paul B.
pros: The ease to build videos in a single instance. Videos that previously took days, now take hours (or minutes) to complete. The Avatars offer our business a wide range of selection to consider for various use cases and the clear product enhancement roadmap that has delivered enhancements across time are enhancing and unlocking more potential for our business.
cons: The overlap of visuals can become quite messy to manage - this has since been addressed in a release from the supplier where we can now easily navigate and manage
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Very satisfied overall - nice ending results, easy to use, and custom options are a very nice touch!
author: Jim V.
pros: The easy learning curve to get started and the continued enhancements are great. The ability to create your personal avatar and voice is a lovely touch!
cons: The inability of the PowerPoint import option to transfer photos from the original PPT. This can be quite frustrating and time-consuming.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: My overall experience with Synthesia has been highly positive. We are able to create high-quality videos that fit our specific needs quickly and efficiently. These videos can then be translated into any language, which greatly expands the audience of our videos to match the global nature of our company. The partnership with [sensitive content hidden] has allowed our videos to come to life with clips that perfectly reflect our written content. I am excited to see how Synthesia continues to benefit us as we continue to create more and more videos to supplement our products.
author: Rob P.
pros: Synthesia is easy to learn and use, and its robust operating system fits the needs of our company very well. The platform is designed for high-quality videos to be generated in a streamlined and professional way, without a huge time demand. Synthesia is changing the game for Above the Neck, because it has given us the opportunity to create videos which enhance our products on a massive scale. We believe the videos we generate through Synthesia will help all of our customers now and in the future.
cons: There are seldom cons associated with Synthesia. My only hope is to someday see more "expressive" avatars that fit the profile needed to best suit the nature of our company (i.e. athletic, youthful, dynamic).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Breaking Language Barriers with Synthesia: A Game-Changer for Multilingual Video Content in EMEA
description: As the Marketing Manager for EMEA, managing a region with over 16 different languages, Synthesia has been a revelation for our video content creation process. The standout feature for me is the tool's ability to effortlessly generate avatars that can speak multiple languages, with incredibly natural speech and lifelike facial expressions. This has allowed us to create localized, engaging content for our diverse audience without needing separate video shoots for each language. The efficiency and quality are unparalleled, saving us time and budget while maintaining high engagement across markets.
author: Andres P.
pros: What I loved most about Synthesia is its ability to generate avatars that seamlessly communicate in over 16 languages. This multilingual feature has been particularly impactful in the EMEA region, enabling us to create localized content that speaks directly to our audience in their native languages without compromising quality or speed.
cons: I can't say I have found something I don't like now.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: My overall experience is positive. I have been an IT/Cloud instructor for 25 years. I am a brilliant instructor/trainer. What I am not good at is curriculum development nor video production for classes. I am also nervous about mistakes in recordings. I initially found Synthesia looking for software I could use to produce video trainings of myself in front of a camera. I had never heard (until maybe a month ago) of technology that can translate text to avatar delivered content. This has been completely mind blowing. For the work I do, this will enable me to scale tremendously and empower more people than I ever imagined in less time.
author: Jerry D.
pros: I absolutely LOVE Synthesia. Making a training video in minutes, or even seconds if my content is already completed (not accounting for the time to generate the video) is amazing. Words like "DOPE" are how people describe the proofs of concept I've done.
cons: What I liked least about Synthesia was figuring out what monthly vs annual or lowest tier vs mid tier package I needed in order to get around the prohibition to use a library avatar to videos that contained religious language. I went up to a higher tier monthly version and then back down to the lowest tier annual version and finally figured out on my own that if I used a personal avatar I could get around the prohibition around religious language with a library avatar. That was frustrating. For a moment, really frustrating. But I figured it out and now people (again) who have seen my proofs of concept are really impressed. I am more than excited to combine this tool with the circle network building platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Synthesia is an excellent tool for creating high-quality videos quickly and effortlessly.
description: Synthesia is an excellent tool for creating high-quality videos quickly and effortlessly. The platform is incredibly user-friendly, allowing users to generate professional-looking videos in just a few minutes.
author: Paola S.
pros: We used Synthesia to develop training videos for our employees, replacing long written manuals with short, visually engaging content. This not only improved knowledge retention but also saved time, as employees could quickly grasp key concepts without needing extensive reading. The feedback has been overwhelmingly positive, with team members appreciating the clarity and accessibility of the information.
cons: One area for improvement would be the synchronization of the avatars, which could be further refined. Additionally, better training for more languages, such as Portuguese, would enhance the overall experience and make the tool even more versatile.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience has been great overall. The platform is super easy to use, and I was able to get the hang of it really quickly. I started making videos right away and had no trouble navigating the features. I even had fun with the Selfie Avatar feature on my third video. It’s an efficient tool that lets me create videos without any hassle, and I’ve genuinely enjoyed working with it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I found the user interface very intuitive, it only took me about 10 minutes to get comfortable with the main features. I was able to jump right in and start creating, and ended up making three videos. By the third one, I even tried out the Selfie Avatar feature."
cons: So far, I haven’t run into any problems with Synthesia. It’s met all of my expectations and has provided everything I need for creating videos efficiently and easily.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with Synthesia somehow considering as average and I managed develop several videos within a limitation of the systems
author: Khairul S.
pros: Synthesia has good and smooth video with a lot of free and premium avatars and multi languages available
cons: I have big difficulties to develop my own avatar features in Synthesia due to stringent rules that couldn't accept the images just due to simple brightness issue
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far, it's been great, and I'm excited to learn more about AI-generated videos. The meeting setups and explanations have also been smooth and easy to understand.
author: Dineshkumar B.
pros: It's a highly useful tool for video editors, bringing together copyright-free templates, music, and media under one roof. It also saves valuable time, making the editing process more efficient.
cons: The templates and media are not aligned with latest trends. The music doesn’t play during the preview stage.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I feel like Synthesia stole from me
description: I signed up early, so I got the old plan. Then when they introduced the new plans, my account did not show any more online. Because of this, I could not cancel and they took seven hundred dollars from me when I did not want to renew. I feel like they stole my money.
author: James B.
pros: Intuitive. I actually liked the service a lot.
cons: Billing charged me for renewal automatically for a full year that I did not want. Support was an Ai bot that told me the charge was non-refundable. What a ripoff! I did not want to continue with the service. It was impossible to cancel online and they made their 'support' very non-supportive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Create dazzling, professional videos with ease
description: Its been a game-changer, saved lots of time. Instead of labour intensive animation, in a fraction of the time, I can get avatars to present content.
author: Elaine B.
pros: The variety of avatars and voices is fabulous and the quality is brilliant, really uplifts videos and makes them engaging.
cons: Until the video is actually rendered by Synthesia, you don't know for sure, that the avatars are going to pronounce all the words correctly. I've had to tweak scripts because there are some words that the VO just can't get consistently right.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The worst one that I could have. If you need to produce videos quickly, never go for Synthesia. You will eventually end up having to prove that your video is not a scam.
author: Felipe T.
pros: It's is intuitive, easy to produce, nice avatars.
cons: They frequently do not approve videos due to "Internal Guidelines". The last onde was "Your video was moderated for violating our Financial Solicitation: Multi-Level-Marketing Schemes guideline." My video had NOTHING related to this. And a previous video was approved and almost identical in content to the one that was moderated. The worst part: 24h waiting review, 48h for appeal. It should be easy make an video, and it looks like we're criminals making scum. It's easier to make a real video.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Excellent. Its saves me so much time that I am producing videos that I never though I would have the time or budget for!
author: Askia R.
pros: So easy to use. Can complete a video on 15 minutes.
cons: Not much I can think of here. The editing would benefit from a feature to update all scenes, but even that is being really picky.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: CEO / Transformation Startergies and AI Consultant
description: Very good indeed its allowed us to stream line production of videos
author: Thomas L.
pros: User friendly and incredibly easy to convert existing content
cons: can be hard to select small items on different layers
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Really amazing how technology has come a long way. Great experience and saving me money and time in creating training videos for employees.
author: Andrew N.
pros: Being able to use AI to generate videos and use of AI avatar to make videos more engaging
cons: Would like more premium avatars and more premium voice selections
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
